transcript: Speaker A: So tell me something about yourself. Speaker B: I work marketing. I like project doing. Speaker B: Kya aapke saath bhi interviews mein aisa hua hai jahaan bolna kuch aur chahte ho aur bol kuch aur jaata hai? Bas ab aur nahi! Pichle 30 din se main SpeakX app use kar raha hoon. Aur meri English kaffi improve ho gayi hai. Yeh koi boring course nahi hai. SpeakX mein AI teacher hai jo aapki English sudharta hai. AI teacher se apni tooti phooti English mein bhi baat karo. Bas roz 30 minutes practice karo aur apni English improve karo. Download the SpeakX app now. [Speaker A: So tell me something about yourself. Speaker B: I work marketing. I like project doing. Speaker B: Has this also happened to you in interviews where you want to say one thing but say another? Not anymore! I have been using the SpeakX app for the last 30 days, and my English has improved a lot. This is not a boring course. SpeakX has an AI teacher that corrects your English. Talk to the AI teacher even in your broken English. Just practice for 30 minutes daily and improve your English. Download the SpeakX app now.]
on_screen_text: SO TELL ME SOMETHING ABOUT YOURSELF. I WORK MARKETING. I LIKE PROJECT DOING. KYA AAPKE SAATH BHI INTERVIEWS MEIN ELISA HUA HAI JAHAAN BOLNA KUCH AUR CHAHTE HO AUR BOL KUCH AUR JAATA HAI? BAS AB AUR NAHI! [Has this also happened to you in interviews where you want to say one thing but say another? Not anymore!] PICHLE 30 DIN SE MAIN SPEAKX APP USE KAR RAHA HOON. MERI ENGLISH KAFFI IMPROVE HO GAYI HE. YEH KOI BORING COURSE NAHI HAI. SPEAKX MEIN AI TEACHER HAI JO AAPKI ENGLISH SUDHARTA HAI. [I have been using the SpeakX app for the last 30 days. My English has improved a lot. This is not a boring course. SpeakX has an AI teacher that corrects your English.] AI TEACHER SE APNI TOOTI PHOOTI ENGLISH MEIN BHI BAAT KARO. BAS ROZ 30 MINUTES PRACTICE KARO. AUR APNI ENGLISH IMPROVE KARO. DOWNLOAD THE SPEAKX APP NOW. [Talk to the AI teacher even in your broken English. Just practice for 30 minutes daily. And improve your English. Download the SpeakX app now.]
summary: The ad begins with a candidate struggling to speak English in a job interview. The presenter introduces the SpeakX app as a solution to overcome this embarrassment. He demonstrates the app's interactive AI teacher and urges viewers to practice daily to improve their English.
